subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath set his face towards the Most Exalted Station and traversed land and sea until he arrived beneath the luminous dome [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن قصد المقام الاعلی و قطع البر و البحر الی ان ورد فی قبه نورآء
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @wisdom [hikmat], @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
